title: Yekaterinburg、Sverdlovsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Yekaterinburg是Sverdlovsk Oblast的一个城市，人口约1,500,000。The capital of the Urals, a key industrial and cultural hub where Europe meets Asia, known for its constructivist architecture.
